TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pierre_Nkurunziza, title = Pierre_Nkurunziza, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pierre_Nkurunziza} }

S.FORM: Pierre Nkurunziza ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 12, Pierre Nkurunziza, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Burundi ta' misuw hya' ga Pierre Nkurunziza, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Pierre Nkurunziza ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 12, Pierre Nkurunziza, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Burundi ta' misuw hya' ga Pierre Nkurunziza, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: pierre nkurunziza rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, pierre nkurunziza, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βurun*i taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa pierre nkurunziza, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
